findings.title: Pipeline Consolidation Summary
findings.description: Consolidated 38 findings from 7 agents into 33 unique findings. Removed 5 duplicates. Identified 4 cross-agent conflicts.

findings.title: Top Priority Findings
findings.description: Highest priority items based on weighted scoring (user_impact×0.35 + business_value×0.30) / (effort×0.20 + risk×0.15): High Demand for Personalization (score=4.074); ClearFeed's Privacy-First Approach is a Market Leader (score=4.042); Primary KPI: Content Click-Through Rate (CTR) (score=3.593); Phased Delivery Plan (score=3.548); User Feedback Collection (score=3.381)

top_priorities.title: ClearFeed's Privacy-First Approach is a Market Leader

findings.title: Cross-Agent Conflict Resolution Report
findings.description: Resolved 4 conflicts between agent findings. feasibility-001 vs requirements-006: GDPR compliance audit is required before launch, but the profiling system lacks lawful basis for processing personal data.; requirements-004 vs customer-004: Cross-device tracking implementation is planned, but enterprise users express strong concerns about cross-device tracking on personal devices.; requirements-005 vs risk-001: Data export for advertisers is planned, but insufficient granular consent mechanisms may lead to legal compliance issues.

evidence.excerpt: GDPR compliance audit is required before launch, but the profiling system lacks lawful basis for processing personal data.
Cross-device tracking implementation is planned, but enterprise users express strong concerns about cross-device tracking on personal devices.
Data export for advertisers is planned, but insufficient granular consent mechanisms may lead to legal compliance issues.
Compliance risks are flagged as high, yet there are significant privacy risks associated with user data handling.

conflicts.description: GDPR compliance audit is required before launch, but the profiling system lacks lawful basis for processing personal data.
conflicts.resolution: Conduct a thorough review of data processing activities and establish lawful bases for all data collection and processing before proceeding with the launch.
conflicts.reasoning: Legal compliance is paramount; addressing the lawful basis for data processing is essential to mitigate compliance risks.

conflicts.description: Cross-device tracking implementation is planned, but enterprise users express strong concerns about cross-device tracking on personal devices.
conflicts.resolution: Implement clear opt-out options for cross-device tracking on personal devices and ensure users are informed about tracking practices.
conflicts.reasoning: User trust and privacy concerns must be prioritized to maintain engagement and satisfaction among enterprise users.

conflicts.description: Data export for advertisers is planned, but insufficient granular consent mechanisms may lead to legal compliance issues.
conflicts.resolution: Enhance consent mechanisms to ensure users can provide informed consent for data sharing with advertisers, addressing legal compliance concerns.
conflicts.reasoning: Ensuring robust consent mechanisms is critical to avoid legal risks associated with data sharing practices.

conflicts.description: Compliance risks are flagged as high, yet there are significant privacy risks associated with user data handling.
conflicts.resolution: Implement strict data handling protocols and privacy measures to mitigate risks before proceeding with compliance-related features.
conflicts.reasoning: Addressing privacy risks is essential to ensure compliance and protect user data effectively.

summary: Consolidated 38 findings into 33 unique items. Removed 5 duplicates, resolved 4 conflicts. Top priority: High Demand for Personalization.
